About Me

Marketing that connects and converts.

I am a marketing professional based in Lisbon, Portugal, with six years of experience building content strategies, managing multi-platform social media campaigns, and generating leads for B2B SaaS companies operating in highly specialised industries.

My background spans cybersecurity and OSINT, HR technology, Web3 and blockchain, and SaaS platforms — environments where every audience has different expectations, vocabulary and ways of engaging with content.

Whatever the industry, I find the right tone, the right words and the right visuals to connect with the people that matter — and keep them coming back.

Selected Campaigns

Work that moved the needle.

A selection of B2B campaigns developed across cybersecurity, HR technology and Web3, each built to reach a specific professional audience and drive measurable outcomes.

Cybersecurity · OSINT
OSINT Industries · Enterprise Lead Generation

Developed multi-platform content strategy targeting law enforcement, financial institutions and cybersecurity firms. Created educational content series covering Myth vs. Reality, case studies, and thought leadership to drive enterprise trial sign-ups across LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and Bluesky. Also produced conference content for Milipol Paris and INTERPOL General Assembly.

LinkedIn
Primary channel
B2B
Enterprise focus
Web3 · Events
ivault · Monte-Carlo WAIB Summit & Trust Circle Talks

Created social media content and promotional materials for ivault's presence at major Web3 and blockchain events. Developed event-specific campaigns, post-event recaps, and community engagement content. Also managed B2B partnership outreach and brand recovery strategy after platform reputation challenges.

Web3
Niche audience
Events
Live coverage
VanillaHR
HR Tech · SaaS
VanillaHR · B2B Content & Social Strategy

Managed content and social media marketing for a B2B HR technology SaaS platform. Developed LinkedIn and social content targeting HR managers, recruiters and business leaders, focusing on lead generation and product awareness. Also wrote blog content for the VanillaHR website covering HR trends, candidate advice and company culture.

HR Tech

Blog Writing

Blog · Thought Leadership
The Future of the HR Industry
How AI is transforming recruiting, employee experience and HR workflows.
Read excerpt ↓
AI will not replace the recruiter. What it will do is automate the repetitive, surface the meaningful, and give HR professionals more room to actually connect with people. The employee experience starts from the first job application and ends at resignation or retirement. Every step in between can be improved.Read full article →Close ↑
Blog · Hiring Strategy
Salespeople Hunt: Steps to Hire Your Next Salespeople
A practical framework for finding and hiring high-performing sales talent.
Read excerpt ↓
Hiring salespeople is one of the highest-stakes decisions a company can make. The wrong hire costs time, pipeline and morale. The right process starts before the job post goes live: define the profile, build a structured funnel, and know exactly what you are testing for at each stage.Read full article →Close ↑
Blog · HR Strategy
Digital Transformation as Part of Your HR Strategy
Why HR is at the centre of every successful digital transformation.
Read excerpt ↓
Digital transformation is not an IT project. It is an organisational shift that starts with people, and HR is at the centre of it. From remote onboarding to AI-assisted screening and digital performance tracking, the tools HR teams use define how fast a company can adapt.Read full article →Close ↑
